left.text: Please fill out the following questionnaire; the information collected will be necessary and used to forward the service request to Olistami. Where an asterisk is present, the field is mandatory
left.company_fields_text: Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required for processing.
left.data_privacy_text: Your data is handled securely in accordance with our general terms

right.no_i_prefer_you_placeholder: No, I prefer you handle it yourselves
